publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

licence.p: This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

sourceDesc.p: Work of the literatures of Ethiopia and Eritrea

encodingDesc.p: Encoded according to the Beta maṣāḥǝft Guidelines. These Guidelines detail the TEI format ruled by the Beta maṣāḥǝft Schema. The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)

revisionDesc.change: Updated edition with textparts for all attested commemorations

div.label: First half of the year
div.note: This record lists all commemorations of the first half of the year attested at least once in No item: BNFabb66A, No item: BNFet677 and No item: EMML6458, all known manuscripts of this recension containing the first half of the year or part of it. The commemorations of each manuscript are described in the respective manuscript records.

div.label: Commemorative notices for the month of Maskaram
Introduction for Maskaram
div.ab: በስመ፡ አብ፡ ወወልድ፡ ወመንፈስ፡ ቅዱስ፡ አሐዱ፡ አምላክ፡ ንወጥን፡ በረድኤተ፡ እግዚኣብሔር፡ ወሠናይ፡ ሀብቱ፡ በጽሒፈ፡ መጽሐፈ፡ ስንክሳር፡ ዘበትርጓሜሁ፡ ጉባኤ፡ ዘቀድኅዎ፡ አበዊነ፡ ቅዱሳን፡ መምህራነ፡ ቤተ፡ ክርስቲያን። አብ፡ ክቡር፡ አባ፡ ሚካኤል፡ ኤጲስ፡ ቆጶስ፡ ዘሀገረ፡ አትሪብ፡ ወመሊግ። ወአብ፡ ክቡር፡ አባ፡ ዮሐንስ፡ ኤጲስ፡ ቆጶስ፡ ዘሀገረ፡ ቡርልስ። ወካልኣን፡ አበው፡ ቅዱሳን፡ ወክቡራን፡ እለ፡ አስተጋብእዎ፡ ለዝንቱ፡ መጽሐፍ፡ እምኵሎሙ፡ ገድላት፡ ዘመላእክት፡ ወሐዋርያት፡ ወነቢያት፡ ወሰማዕታት፡ ወሊቃነ፡ ጳጳሳት፡ ወጻድቃን፡ ወገዳማዊያን፡ ወመነኮሳት። ከመ፡ ይግበሩ፡ ተዝካሮሙ፡ ወያንብቡ፡ ገድሎሙ፡ ኵሎ፡ አሚረ፡ እም፩ ለመስከረም፡ እስከ፡ ተፍጻሜተ፡ ዓመት። ወኮነ፡ አስተጋብኦቱ፡ በ፱፻፷ወ፫ዓመት፡ ለሰማዕታት፡ ንጹሓን። ጸሎቶሙ፡ ወበረከቶሙ፡ የሀሉ፡ ምስሌነ፡ አሜን።

div.label: Decapitation of St John the Baptist
Commemoration of the council of Alexandria under Dionysios of Alexandria
Commemoration of Sofyā, different version in the second recension.
Commemoration of Isaiah
div.note: Includes St Michael's intervention against King Sennacherib

div.label: Commemoration of ʾAgātu, Ṗeṭros, Yoḥannǝs, ʾAmon, ʾAmonā, Rafiqā
Commemoration of the 14 730 men and 7 women with Basilides.
Commemoration of the miracle of Michael in Fǝrugyā.
Commemoration of the birth of Mary
Commemoration of ʾAṭnāsyā and her three daughters
Commemoration of the council of Ephesus
Commemoration of ʾAflāhos and his companions
Commemoration of a miracle of Basil of Caesarea.
Commemoration of the translatio of St Stephen the Protomartyr.
Commemoration of the consecration of the temple in Jerusalem.
Commemoration of ʾabuna Mātewos of Dabra Wifāt (non-standard).
Commemoration of Cyprian of Antioch and Justina.
Commemoration of ʾabuna Yoḥannǝs of Dabra ʾƎsṭifānos (non-standard).
Commemoration of Mārqoryos of Dabra Tulā (non-standard).
Birth of St John the Baptist.
Commemoration of the miracle of the salvation of Athanasius.
Commemorative notices for the month of Ṭǝqǝmt
Commemoration of Yoḥannǝs the patriarch of Constantinople
div.note: The commemorated patriarch is called in Ṗāwlos in No item: LIT4033Senkessar.

div.label: Commemoration of James, son of Alphaeus
Commemoration of ʾƎnṭonyos, bishop of Bānā
Commemoration of Diyonāsyos, bishop of ʾAtenā
Commemoration of Maqʷǝrofyos, ʾabbā ʾAblo and Ṗeṭros
Commemoration of Dioscorus II of Alexandria
Commemoration of Bartalomewos and his wife
Commemoration of the council of Antioch
Commemoration of the translatio of Lazarus
Commemoration of Diyonāsyos, bishop of Qorotos
Commemoration of Ṗāwlos and his friend
Commemoration of the consecration of the church of Julius of Aqfahs
Commemoration of James the Just and Hurās
Commemoration of Maqārǝs, bishop of ʾIdku
Commemoration of the birth of Jesus Christ
Commemoration of the birth of Dǝmeṭrǝyos
Commemorative notices for the month of Ḫǝdar
Commemoration of Maksimos, Numanfyos, Fiqṭor and Filǝṗṗos
Long commemoration of Kāleb, apparently identical to the one occuring in the second recension on 20th Gǝnbot (non-standard).
Commemoration of Peter III of Alexandria
Commemoration of ʾAtnāsyos and his sister ʾIrāʾi
Commemoration of Yoḥannǝs and Yāʿqob, bishops of Fārs
Commemoration of Tomās, bishop of Damāsqo
Commemoration of the translatio of Tewodros
Commemoration of the consecration of the tabernacle by Jesus Christ on Qʷǝsqʷām
Commemoration of ʾabbā Minās, bishop of Tǝmay
Commemoration of the consecration of the church of St George of Lydda
Commemoration of the council of Nicaea
Commemoration of Sofyā and her daughters
Commemoration of the council at the time of king Fiqṭoryos
Commemoration of ʾArkilāʾos, ʾElsāʿ the abbot and ʾAkumis
Commemoration of Michael, history of Dortāwos and Tāwobǝstā (non-standard)
Commemoration of Michael, history of Bǝḥrān, as transmitted in the second recension on 12 Sane (non-standard)
Commemoration of the consecration of the church of ʾabbā Nāfǝr
Beginning of the fasting period before christmas according to the Jacobites (non-standard)
Commemoration of the translatio of John Chrysostom
Commemoration of the consecration of the church of Sargis
Beginning of the Europeans' fast before Christmas
Commemoration of the consecration of the church of Tewodros
Commemoration of ʾabbā Qozimos the patriarch
Commemoration of the martyrs of ʾƎsnumnay
Commemoration of Qozmos, Damyānos and their family
Commemoration of the martyrs of Nagrān (non-standard)
Commemoration of ʾabbā Libānos of Dabra Qʷanāṣǝl (non-standard)
Commemoration of the birth of Christ (non-standard)
Commemoration of Maqāryos, consecration of the church of Qozmos and Dimiyānos
Commemorative notices for the month of Tāḫśāś
Commemoration of Ṗeṭros, the bishop of Gazā
Commemoration of ʾabbā Yoḥannǝs the patriarch
Commemoration of ʾabbā ʾAtnāsyos the patriarch
Commemoration of the servants of Fāsiladas
Commemoration of the presentation of Mary to the temple
Commemoration of the church of ʾArsimā
Commemoration of ʾabbā ʾEsi and his sister Teklā
Commemoration of the translatio of Sāwiros
Commemoration of ʾabbā Tāʾofānyos the patriarch
Long commemoration of Michael, apparently identical to the one of the second recension
Commemoration of the council of Rome
Commemoration of the conception of Ḥannā
Commemoration of ʾabbā Bǝḥur and ʾabbā Minās
Commemoration of Marmǝhnām and his sister Sārā
Commemoration of Gabra Krǝstos the patriarch
Commemoration of Ḥanānyā and Kozi of ʾAkmim
Commemoration of the translatio of Titus
Commemoration of the Ḥagge the prophet
Commemoration of ʾAgnāṭyos, patriarch of Antioch
Commemoration of Filogosyos, patriarch of Antioch
Commemoration of the birth of Christ
Commemoration of the martyrs of ʾAndenāw
Second commemoration of the birth of Christ
Commemorative notices for the month of Ṭǝrr
Commemoration of St Stephen the Protomartyr
Commemoration of ʾabbā Tewonās, patriarch of Alexandria
Commemoration of the consecration of the church of Mary in the monastery of ʾabbā Sinodā
Commemoration of the children of Bethlehem
Commemoration of the translatio of Elijah
Commemoration of ʾabbā Markiyānu the patriarch
Commemoration of Salṗeṭros the patriarch of Rome
Commemoration of the consecration of the church of ʾabbā Maqārǝs
Commemoration of ʾabbā ʾAndirāniqos the patriarch of Alexandria
Commemoration of ʾabbā Bǝnyāmin the patriarch of Alexandria
Commemoration of the institution of two fasting days in case Christmas or Epiphany fall on a Wednesday or Friday
Commemoration of the baptism of Christ
Commemoration of the wedding at Qānā (non-standard)
Commemoration of the wedding at Qānā
Commemoration of Gregory of Nyssa among the Syrians
Commemoration of ʾabbā Bǝhurā and ʾabbā Bāsurā
Commemoration of Bǝhnu and consecration of the church of Yoḥannǝs
Commemoration of the death of St Mary
Commemoration of the translatio of Ṭimotewos
Commemoration of the birth of Christ (non-standard)
Commemoration of Ṗisṭis, ʾAlāṗis, ʾAgābis and their mother Sofyā
Commemorative notices for the month of Yakkātit
Commemoration of the council of Constantinople
Commemoration of the consecration of the church of Ṗeṭros
Commemoration of the translatio of St Ephrem the Syrian
Commemoration of ʾabbā ʾAqrǝṗinu the patriarch
Commemoration of the translatio of the 49 martyrs of Scetis
Commemoration of ʾabbā ʾAblo the shepherd
Commemoration of ʾabbā Qir, Yoḥannǝs, three virgins and their mother
Commemoration of ʾabbā ʾƎlǝskǝndǝros the patriarch
Commemoration of ʾabbā Tewodros the patriarch
Commemoration of the presentation of Christ to the temple
Commemoration of James, son of Alphaeus
Commemoration of Balātyānos the patriarch of Rome
Commemoration of ʾabbā Ṭimotewos the patriarch
Commemoration of Yāʿqob the patriarch of Alexandria
Commemoration of the consecration of the church of the martyrs of Sǝbǝsṭyā
Commemoration of Malanyos the patriarch of Antiochia
Commemoration of the translatio of Martǝyānos
Commemoration of Bāsǝlyos, Tewodosyos and Ṭimotewos
Commemoration of Qonā, Minās and Dǝlmādyos
Commemoration of ʾEwǝsṭātewos, patriarch of Antioch
Commemoration of the invention of the head of St John the Baptist
Second half of the year
div.note: This record lists all commemorations of the second half of the year attested in No item: BNFabb66B, the only known witness of this recension for the second part of the year.

div.label: Introduction for the second half of the year
Commemorative notices for the month of Maggābit
Commemoration of the Council of Ǧazīra Banī ʿUmar
Commemoration of Theodosius I ቴዎደስዮስ፡ Tewodosyos Θεοδόσιος Theodosios
Commemoration of ʾAndyānos, his wife, ʾAwsābyos, ʾArmā and forty martyrs
Commemoration of Demetrius I of Alexandria
Commemoration of the Forty Martyrs of Sebaste
Commemoration of Giyorgis, Talāsyos and Yosef
Consecration of the Church of ʾAsqarān
Commemoration of the Anointing of Jesus
Commemoration of the priests' conspiracy to kill Lazarus
Commemoration of the translation of Yāʿqob
Commemorative notices for the month of Miyāzyā
Commemoration of the miraculous protection of the Wādī an-Naṭrūn from Arab invaders
Commemoration of Fiqṭor, Dākiyos, ʾEreni and others
Apparition of Jesus Christ to Thomas
Commemoration of ʾAgābos, Teyodǝrā, ʾabbā Maqrufā
Commemoration of ʾAgābi, ʾOrni and Sononayā
Commemoration of a miracle at the hand of Shenute of Atripe
Commemoration of ʾƎlǝskǝndǝros, bishop of Jerusalem
Commemoration of ʾƎnṭonyos, bishop of Ṭāmaw
Commemoration of ʾabbā ʾIyāsu and ʾabbā Yosef, disciples of Milyos
Commemoration of the consecration of the church of St Nicholas in Alexandria
Commemoration of James son of Zebedee
Commemoration of Sǝmʿon of ʾArmānya, bishop of Fārs
Commemoration of St George of Lydda
Commemoration of Babnudā, Tewodros and 100 martyrs in Fārs
Commemoration of the birth of Jesus Christ
Commemoration of the birth of Mark
Commemorative notices for the month of Gǝnbot
Commemoration of the birth of St Mary
Commemoration of James, son of Alphaeus
Commemoration of the ascension of Jesus Christ
Commemoration of Three Youths in the Furnace
Commemoration of an apparition of the cross in Jerusalem
Commemoration of ʾabbā ʾAron the Syrian
Commemoration of Yulyānos and his mother
Commemoration of the arrival of Jesus Christ in Egypt
Commemoration of the translatio of the body of Epiphanius of Salamis
Commemoration of the birth of Jesus Christ
Commemorative notices for the month of Sane
Commemoration of the consecration of the church of Lāwǝntewos
Commemoration of Qozmos of Tahā and his companions
Commemoration of the discovery of the relics of St John the Baptist and Elisha
Commemoration of the reopening of the church of Mary in Zawela
Commemoration of the consecration of the church of Mary in Mǝḥḍāb
Commemoration of Tǝmādā and her children, ʾArmānos and his mother
Commemoration of Lukilyānos and four martyrs
Commemoration of Dābamon and Bǝsṭāmon and their mother Sofyā
Commemoration of the Edict of Milan
Commemoration of the consecration of the church of the 40 martyrs in Alexandria
Commemoration of Michael, story of ʾAwfimyā and institution of the feast of Michael
Commemoration of Yoḥannǝs, bishop of Jerusalem
Commemoration of ʾabbā ʾAkrā, Yoḥannǝs, ʾAbṭǝlmā and Filǝṗṗā
Commemoration of the consecration of the church of Menās in Maryuṭ
Commemoration of Gabriel and the consecration of his church in Naqlon
Commemoration of the birth of Jesus Christ
Commemoration of the seven martyrs of Tunā
Commemoration of Hor, Bǝsoy and Daydarā
Commemoration of the birth of St John the Baptist
Commemorative notices for the month of Ḥamle
Commemoration of the translatio of ʾAbuqir and Yoḥannǝs
Commemoration of the martyrdom of Peter and Paul
Commemoration of Tewodros, bishop of the Pentapolis
Commemoration of Tewodros, bishop of Qorontos
Commemoration of St Ephrem the Syrian
Commemoration of the consecration of the church of Marqoryos
Commemoration of the ascension of Henok and commemoration of the 20500 martyrs of ʾAtrib
Commemoration of the vision of Ezekiel and consecration of the church John the Evangelist in Alexandria
Commemoration of the birth of Jesus Christ
Commemoration of the translatio of Judas Thaddeus
Commemoration of the translatio of Ṭimotewos
Commemorative notices for the month of Naḥāse
Commemoration of ʾabuna Sǝmʿon of Dabra Dāgā
Commemoration of Dāwit and his brothers
Commemoration of the annunciation of Mary's birth
Commemoration of the 2000 companions of Fāsiladas
Commemoration of the 2000 companions of Fāsiladas
Commemoration of the transfiguration of Jesus Christ
Commemoration of the mircale produced by ʾabbā Tewofilos in Alexandria
Commemoration of the Assumption of St Mary
Commemoration of the translation of Maqārǝs
Commemoration of the seven sleepers of Ephesus
Commemoration of the 30000 martyrs of Alexandria
Commemoration of ʾabbā Bǝnāmǝn and ʾAwdoksyā
Commemoration of ʾAbrǝhām, Yǝsḥaq and Yāʿqob
Commemoration of the translatio of Yǝsḥaq
Commemoration of the translatio of Yāʿqob
Commemoration of the birth of Jesus Christ
Commemoration of the birth of ʾAtnātiyos
Commemoration of ʾabbā Muse, bishop of Faramā
Commemorative notices for the month of Ṗagʷǝmen
Commemoration of Rufāʾel, consecration of his church and miracle
Commemoration of the end of the year
